subcodes.first_line: O Lord my God! Whensoever I attempt to unloose my tongue to extol the wondrous expressions of Thy transcendent oneness
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای رب یا الهی کلما ارید ان افتح لسانی ببدایع اذکار عز وحدانیتک او احرک شفتی
subcodes.subjects: @material world a reflection of the spiritual, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @prayer for forgiveness
